programme.desc: A family says they received a photo claiming their dog had been hit by a car - only to discover it was a scam.

programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: With most of NCIS away and the mainframe shut down for a midnight upgrade, Kasie and a skeleton crew are left in a darkened building when someone begins hunting from inside.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins
programme.desc: While Gibbs and Lala grow closer on a case, Gibbs' long-distance relationship with Diane is further tested by the arrival of an unexpected guest -- Gibbs' father.

programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance when a hospital ward is taken hostage; the team must wrestle with an impossible dilemma.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.desc: CBS News Mornings broadcasts on weekdays and offers viewers up-to-date news, comprehensive weather forecasts, and highlights from the world of sports.

programme.title: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Victor makes good on a promise; Diane finds Jack and Nikki in a compromising position; Victoria digs for dirt on Phyllis.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Someone gets stabbed; Martin updates a wary Nicole; Bill learns something disturbing, which puts Hayley in the hot seat; Tomas romances Kat; Shanice and Ted discuss their evolving relationship.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: John Early and Kate Berlant tell Drew about doing comedy together and their new film "Maddie's Secret.".

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is celebrating Earth Day with some eco conscious cooking and a special giveaway.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: $10,000 Back Child Support Blues!; Brick to the Head?!
programme.desc: A relative sues an ex-con for repayment of a loan to pay child support to his three baby-mamas; a man denies hitting his sister in the head with a rock, explaining that he was aiming at his mother.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Love Triangle Assault!; Can't Buy Me Love!
programme.desc: A woman is accused of beating up her husband's girlfriend; a man claims his ex chose love over money.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: America's Culinary Cup
programme.desc: Whipping up 30 identical fish dishes may be a team effort, but when push comes to shove, it's every chef for themselves as they scramble to deliver what the judges are looking for.

programme.sub-title: Child Left in a Runaway Car?; Beer and Bones Over the Balcony!

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Yoga Promo Gone Bad!; Broken Tooth Tiff; Happy Dog Reunion!
programme.desc: A woman says a yoga studio owner she met in line at a restaurant gave her $2,000 for used gym equipment; a woman wants her boyfriend to repay her for a loan for dental work; a dog's new owners want to return him after learning he will need surgery.
